nasb.text: When David’s young men came, they spoke to Nabal according to all these words in David’s name; then they waited.

esv.text: When David’s young men came, they said all this to Nabal in the name of David, and then they waited.

cnv.text: 大衛的僕人到了，就以大衛的名義，把這些話都對拿八說了，然後等候答覆。

ccb.text: 大卫的部下就去把大卫的话告诉拿八，等候他的答复。
